// Utile pour: Afficher tous les points mais seulement d'un utilisateur dans un mois et année spécifique

methods.name: findLatestPointsPerUserPerMonth
findLatestPointsPerUserForCurrentMonth
methods.code:
@Query(value = """
    SELECT * FROM (
        SELECT *,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                   PARTITION BY user_id
                   ORDER BY assignment_date DESC
               ) AS rn
        FROM point
        WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM assignment_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
          AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM assignment_date) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)
    ) p
    WHERE p.rn = 1
    """, countQuery = """
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (
        SELECT 1,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                   PARTITION BY user_id
                   ORDER BY assignment_date DESC
               ) AS rn
        FROM point
        WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM assignment_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
          AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM assignment_date) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)
    ) p
    WHERE p.rn = 1
    """, nativeQuery = true)
Page<Point> findLatestPointsPerUserForCurrentMonth(Pageable pageable);

methods.name: countLatestPointsPerUserForCurrentMonth
methods.code:
@Query(value = """
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (
        SELECT 1
        FROM (
            SELECT user_id,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                    PARTITION BY user_id
                    ORDER BY assignment_date DESC
                ) AS rn
            FROM point
            WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM assignment_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
            AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM assignment_date) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)
        ) p
        WHERE p.rn = 1
    ) AS counted
    """, nativeQuery = true)
Long countLatestPointsPerUserForCurrentMonth();

getLatestMonthlyPointsForUser
methods.code:
// Utile pour: Tableau de bord Employee: Calculer le total de points par mois et année (Graphique)
@Query(value = """
    SELECT
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM assignment_date) AS year,
        EXTRACT(MONTH FROM assignment_date) AS month,
        point_count
    FROM (
        SELECT *,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                   PARTITION BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM assignment_date), EXTRACT(MONTH FROM assignment_date)
                   ORDER BY assignment_date DESC
               ) AS rn
        FROM point
        WHERE user_id = :userId
    ) p
    WHERE p.rn = 1
    ORDER BY year, month
    """, nativeQuery = true)
List<Object[]> getLatestMonthlyPointsForUser(@Param("userId") String userId);

methods.name: countCriteriaByMonthAndYearForUser
methods.code:
// Tableau de bord Employee: Calculer le nombre de critères par mois et année (Graphique)
@Query(value = """
    SELECT
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM assignment_date) AS year,
        EXTRACT(MONTH FROM assignment_date) AS month,
        criterion,
        COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM point
    WHERE user_id = :userId
    GROUP BY year, month, criterion
    ORDER BY year, month, criterion
    """, nativeQuery = true)
List<Object[]> countCriteriaByMonthAndYearForUser(@Param("userId") String userId);

methods.name: sumPointsByUserIdAndDateBetween
methods.code:
@Query("SELECT COALESCE(SUM(p.pointCount), 0) FROM Point p WHERE p.userId = :userId AND p.assignmentDate BETWEEN :start AND :end")
Double sumPointsByUserIdAndDateBetween(@Param("userId") String userId, @Param("start") LocalDateTime start, @Param("end") LocalDateTime end);
